page.title: Persona Library
page.subtitle: Choose a persona to guide your AI conversations

create.pageSubtitle: Create a custom persona that matches your writing style

premiumLock.dailyLimitDescription: You've tried {used} of {max} premium personas today. Upgrade for unlimited access!
premiumLock.alreadyTriedDescription: You've already tried the "{name}" persona today. Try again tomorrow or upgrade!

library.premiumNote: Try 1 message per persona per day (5 personas max)
library.noResultsDescription: Try adjusting your search or category filter
library.emptyDescription: No personas have been created yet. You can create your own custom persona!

form.subtitleCreate: Create an AI persona with a unique style

placeholders.name: e.g., Digital Marketing Expert
placeholders.description: A brief description in one or two sentences
placeholders.systemPrompt:
Write the instructions that guide the persona's behavior...

Example: You are a digital marketing expert...

hints.systemPrompt: These instructions guide the AI to behave as your custom persona. Be as specific as possible.
hints.icon: Choose an emoji or enter an image URL (optional)

errors.systemPromptTooLong: System prompt is too long (max 4,000 characters)
errors.iconUrlInvalid: Icon URL must start with https://

form.limitDescription: Upgrade to premium to create unlimited personas

preview.description: This is how your persona will appear in the library
